{{Infobox character
| name = Mist Sage
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Mist Sage]] is a human woman with a round face, mud-brown hair, and desert sand-colored skin.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Mist Sage]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Mist Sage]] taught [[Reigan Shen]] about the manipulation of space.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Mist Sage]] is a figure whose gaze Emriss's gaze reminded Reigan of.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
